basic_details.job_title: PSNSU Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 19 Professor Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Pandit Shambhu Nath Shukla University Shahdol (PSNSU)
basic_details.short_information: Pandit Shambhu Nath Shukla University Shahdol (PSNSU) Recruitment 2026: Pandit Shambhu Nath Shukla University Shahdol has released the official notification for 19 Professor posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Madhya Pradesh. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Professor (Biotechnology): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Botany): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Chemistry): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Commerce): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Computer Science): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Economics): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Electronics): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (English): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Fisheries): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Geography): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Hindi): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (History): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Mathematics): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Physics): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Political Science): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Sanskrit): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Sociology): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 Professor (Zoology): As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018

selection_process: As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 and University norms
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PSNSU Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PSNSU to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: PSNSU Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PSNSU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PSNSU Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PSNSU Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: As per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 and University norms

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the PSNSU Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of PSNSU to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for PSNSU Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date for online application submission for the PSNSU Professor posts is 30th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Professor posts?
faq.answer: Pandit Shambhu Nath Shukla University Shahdol has announced a total of 19 vacancies for the Professor positions across various disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Professor posts will receive a salary as per Academic Pay Level 14.

faq.question: Q4. Where can I find the official notification for PSNSU Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the Important Links section on this page. It contains all detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for PSNSU Professor Recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the PSNSU Professor Recruitment 2026 is entirely online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q6. What are the eligibility criteria for the Professor posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria for the Professor posts are as per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018. Specific details for each discipline are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for PSNSU Professor Recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the available information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the PSNSU Professor Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Professor posts will be conducted as per UGC Regulations 18 July 2018 and University norms.

faq.question: Q9. What is the start date for online applications?
faq.answer: The online application process for the PSNSU Professor Recruitment 2026 begins on 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Which state is this government job notification for?
faq.answer: This government job notification is for positions located in Madhya Pradesh, specifically in Shahdol.
